name: ghcc-custom-provider
description: Connect GitHub Copilot Chat to OpenAI-compatible and LM Studio endpoints through a custom VS Code language model provider.

scripts.package: npm run check && npm run build && vsce package

commands.title: GHCC Custom Provider: Open Raw Settings
GHCC Custom Provider: Set API Key
GHCC Custom Provider: Clear API Key

ghccCustomProvider.backend.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Legacy import-only setting. The manager UI saves current values into raw extension storage instead of writing to settings.json.

ghccCustomProvider.backend.defaultModel.markdownDescription: Legacy import-only setting. The manager UI saves current values into raw extension storage instead of writing to settings.json.
